linting.notes: No linter configuration found. This is a metadata-only repository storing Kubernetes manifests for operator builds. No code linting is applicable.

testing.notes: No test infrastructure found. This repository does not contain source code or tests. It is a storage repository for build metadata and Kubernetes manifests.

ci.notes: No CI configuration found. This repository is automatically updated by an external build system that commits metadata for each operator image build. Commits follow the pattern 'build-meta for operator image [hash]'.

build.notes: No build system found. This repository stores pre-built artifacts (Kubernetes manifests) organized by image hash. Each hash directory contains manifests-config.yaml, operands-map.yaml, and approximately 1300 YAML manifest files.

conventions.notes: Repository structure: components/odh-operator/[SHA256-hash]/. Each hash directory represents a specific operator image build and contains manifests and configuration mapping components to their source repositories and git commits.

container_recipe.notes: N/A - No container validation applicable. Repository contains only YAML manifests.

validation.summary: No validation performed. Repository is metadata-only with no executable code, tests, or linters.

gaps: No source code - repository stores only build metadata and Kubernetes manifests
No tests - this is an artifact storage repository, not a development repository
No linters - no code to lint
No CI workflows - repository is updated automatically by external build system
No build process - manifests are pre-generated and committed
No development tooling (Makefile, package.json, pyproject.toml, etc.)
Repository purpose: stores snapshots of operator manifests and metadata for each operator image build
